# Christian José Torrealba Rondón
> Systems Engineer & Agile Product Builder | Specialized in Data-Driven Web Products

## Executive Summary
Bridging business and technology to deliver data-driven, user-centric products. Proficient in leveraging web technologies and product strategy to transform complex requirements into high-impact digital solutions.

## Strategic Skills
- Agile Leadership, Coaching, Product Ownership
- Strategic Thinking & Data Analytical Skills
- Business Intelligence & API Design
- Product Development & Digital Marketing
- Experimentation, PoCs, & Tech Research
- Artificial Intelligence

## Technical Ecosystem & Tools
- **Web & JavaScript:** Vue, ReactJS, Angular, Astro, TypeScript, Tailwind, SASS
- **Server-side & DBMS:** NodeJS, Ruby on Rails, Python, RESTful API, GraphQL, MongoDB, Redis, SQL (MySQL, SQL Server, PostgreSQL), NoSQL, ORMs (Sequelize, Drizzle)
- **Data Visualization & ETL:** D3.js, HighCharts, ChartJS, SigmaJS, PowerBI, Tableau, Microsoft SSAS/SSIS, Pentaho BI
- **Design, Product Analytics & Maps:** Figma, Zeplin, Adobe XD, Segment, Amplitude, Google Analytics, Facebook Ads, Google Maps/Earth, Mapbox, Cesium, ArcGIS

---

## Professional Experiences

### Product and Digital Growth Consultant
**Optimus Shanghai** | China (Remote from Spain) | Supply Chain Provider
*2025 - Present (Part-time Advisor)*
- Led technical product strategy and tech-stack selection, transforming business goals into an early-stage web platform implementation.
- Accelerated virtual presence and met user requirements efficiently.

### Senior Product Software Engineer (Front-end focus)
**Zeelo** | Spain | Intelligent Mobility Solutions
*May 2024 - Jul 2025*
- Collaborated in proactive identification and definition of platform solutions, optimizing service for a growing user base via RFCs, documenting specs, and best practices adoption.
- Ensured application quality and reliability through peer reviews, tech debt reduction, and comprehensive testing strategies (Jest, Cypress, Storybook).
- Developed key features to adapt products to mobility trends (web app for ride optimization, managing rides, and purchasing travel passes).
- **Tech Stack:** ReactJS, NodeJS, React-Query, Redux, Webpack, Vite, TypeScript, Jest, Jest-Dom, Enzyme, Cypress, Storybook, Figma, MySQL, Python, GoogleMaps, Notion, Jira, Bitbucket.

### Solutions Engineer - Full Stack Software Engineer
**Stuart Delivery** | Spain | Logistic Services
*Oct 2020 - Jun 2023*
- Developed solutions elevating customer experiences and operational efficiency across last-mile logistics platforms, integrating multiple strategic partners.
- Gathered stakeholder requirements and delivered solutions through Scrum/Kanban, spec documentation, prototyping, and active monitoring.
- Co-architected live monitoring tools, fleet tracking systems, and API integrations, improving operational visibility.
- **Tech Stack:** ReactJS, NodeJS, RubyOnRails, TypeScript, Jest, Enzyme, Cypress, GraphQL, RESTful API, Sequelize, Grafana, Jira, MySQL, Tableau, Git, Figma, CloudWatch, Webpack, Jenkins, GitHub.

### Frontend Developer Architect (Product and Fintech)
**Zank Financial PFP** | Spain | Financial Services
*Nov 2019 - Oct 2020*
- Led development, maintenance, and improvement of front-end architecture for a fintech web app, ensuring user experience and strict regulatory compliance.
- Implemented critical third-party integrations (payment gateways, transactional e-mailing/SMS systems, loggers) minimizing service interruptions.
- **Tech Stack:** VueJS, NodeJS, HTML5, CSS, SASS, MySQL, Git, Postman, Trello.

### Frontend Software Engineer (Data focus)
**SDG Group** | Spain | Data Consulting Firm
*Nov 2018 - Oct 2019*
- Automated front-end environments for analytics web applications, reducing deployment times and improving dev team efficiency.
- Led UI development for a KPI-displaying chatbot with custom charts to simplify complex data and business analytics.
- Developed web prototype mashup for augmented reality visualizations of sales trends, showcased at the Qlik Connections Global Conference (2019).
- **Tech Stack:** VueJS, Angular, NodeJS, Webpack, SigmaJS (D3.js), RESTful API, Qlik Sense Hub, Git, Jira, Dialogflow.

### Frontend User Interface Developer (Enterprise Solutions)
**Kapsch TrafficCom AG** | Argentina | Intelligent Transportation Systems
*Jul 2016 - Oct 2017*
- Developed a web-based back-office system for a vehicle free-flow tolling system handling millions of transactions (customer modules, payments, tag management, vehicle reporting).
- Created mocked RESTful APIs according to back-end specs, accelerating frontend delivery and testing of early-stage service-side implementations.
- **Tech Stack:** Angular, NodeJS, HTML5, CSS, SASS, Swagger, JasperReports, SQL Server, Microsoft TFS.

### Product Software Engineer (Data Intelligence and R&D)
**Petroleum of Venezuela (PDVSA)** | Venezuela | Energy and Hydrocarbons
*May 2011 - Jan 2016*
- Co-designed and delivered a real-time web application for economic scenario analysis, leveraging GIS technologies (Google Earth, KML/KMZ) to transform geoscience data visualization. Showcased at the AAPG (2011).
- Created data models and utilized BI tools (ETL/DWH design) to summarize large hydrocarbon production volumes, improving information accessibility.
- Developed economic and financial simulations using R to assess viability and risks of new business ventures.
- **Tech Stack:** jQuery, HTML5, PHP, MySQL, PostgreSQL, R Statistics, Pentaho BI, HighCharts, ArcGIS.

### IT Systems Responsible (Customer Enablement)
**Miranda's Public Employees S&L (CAPEM)** | Venezuela | Non-profit Finances
*Nov 2009 - May 2011*
- Designed and developed a web-based CRM, centralizing business areas to improve customer service management and client support efficiency.
- Developed a web queuing system including a self-service touchscreen interactive kiosk to automate balance checks and reduce wait times.
- **Tech Stack:** jQuery, HTML5, Flash, AS3, PHP, MySQL.
